description: A designed graphic styled as a screenshot of a Truth Social / X post from Donald J. Trump, with two photos attached. At the top is the flag-overlaid circular Trump avatar, the name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verified badge and Truth Social badge icon, and handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The black body text reads: 'Sample test of the Reflecting Pool with the Lincoln Memorial and the Washington Monument in the background — at each end of the Pool — which is, by the way, the World's longest. Looking really good! Should be completed before the Fourth of July, our target date. Have substantially upgraded construction materials, including surface qualities, sandblasting granite, and exterior stone and walkways. I've made this a much larger job than originally contemplated for purposes of Beauty, and a much longer life. Also, went to a higher quality sealer with more reflectivity. Check it out before the Opening — It's a very exciting project! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. Below are two color photographs: left shows the Lincoln Memorial mirrored in the new reflecting pool's water; right shows the Washington Monument and a tour bus reflected at the other end, with construction equipment/hoses visible. The technique is presenting Trump's personal commentary as evidence of capital-beautification accomplishments. Target audience: general public and supporters, reinforcing a 'building/beautifying America' narrative.
notable_text: Sample test of the Reflecting Pool with the Lincoln Memorial and the Washington Monument in the background... Should be completed before the Fourth of July... It's a very exciting project! President DONALD J. TRUMP
